center.name: 埃利亚斯·皮尼亚省
center.summary: 埃利亚斯·皮尼亚省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Antillean siskin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also found north of there in the Dominican Republic in the Sierra de Neiba and further northeast in the Cordillera Central. It inhabits pine forest and the edges of moist broadleaf forest and also grassy clearings in them. In elevation it mostly ranges between but is found as low as in very cold weather
